messages.content: You are a marine navigation instruction parser. Return JSON only.
Instruction: Pass between the red and green buoys

{"instruction": "Pass between the red and green buoys", "language": "en", "parser": "vlm_v1", "sequence": [{"order": 1, "action": "pass_between", "target": {"left": "red_buoy", "right": "green_buoy"}, "spatial_relation": "between"}]}
You are a marine navigation instruction parser. Return JSON only.
Instruction: 先通过红绿浮标之间，再去marker并停下

{"instruction": "先通过红绿浮标之间，再去marker并停下", "language": "zh", "parser": "vlm_v1", "sequence": [{"order": 1, "action": "pass_between", "target": {"left": "red_buoy", "right": "green_buoy"}, "spatial_relation": "between"}, {"order": 2, "action": "go_to", "target": "marker", "spatial_relation": "at"}, {"order": 3, "action": "stop_near", "target": "current_position", "spatial_relation": "at"}]}
